title: Zaporizhzhia: 4 missiles intercepted
description: 4 MISSILES AND 503 ENEMY UAVS SHOT DOWN/SUPPRESSED On the night of May 18 (from 18:00 on May 17), the enemy launched a combined attack on the territory of Ukraine using attack UAVs and land-based missiles. The main direction of the attack is Dnipro and Dnipropetrovsk region. Odeshchyna, Chernihiv Oblast, and Zaporizhzhia were also attacked. ❗️ A total of 546 devices were recorded by the radio engineering troops of the Air Force...
description_en: 4 MISSILES AND 503 ENEMY UAVS SHOT DOWN/SUPPRESSED On the night of May 18 (from 18:00 on May 17), the enemy launched a combined attack on the territory of Ukraine using attack UAVs and land-based missiles. The main direction of the attack is Dnipro and Dnipropetrovsk region. Odeshchyna, Chernihiv Oblast, and Zaporizhzhia were also attacked. ❗️ A total of 546 devices were recorded by the radio engineering troops of the Air Force...
description_uk: ЗБИТО/ПОДАВЛЕНО 4 РАКЕТИ ТА 503 ВОРОЖИХ БПЛА ➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖ У ніч на 18 травня (з 18.00 17 травня) противник завдав комбінованого удару по території України із застосуванням ударних БпЛА та ракет наземного базування. Основний напрямок удару – Дніпро та Дніпропетровщина. Також атаковано Одещину, Чернігівщину, Запоріжжя. ❗️ Усього радіотехнічними військами Повітряних Сил зафіксовано 546 засобів...

title: Dnipro: 18 injured
description: Update: Russian drones, missiles strike residential buildings in multiple Ukrainian regions, injuring at least 20. The number of injured victims in Russia's overnight attack on Ukraine has risen to 20, including 18 injured victims stemming from an attack on a residential building in Dnipro, officials reported.
description_en: Update: Russian drones, missiles strike residential buildings in multiple Ukrainian regions, injuring at least 20. The number of injured victims in Russia's overnight attack on Ukraine has risen to 20, including 18 injured victims stemming from an attack on a residential building in Dnipro, officials reported.
description_uk: Update: Russian drones, missiles strike residential buildings in multiple Ukrainian regions, injuring at least 20. The number of injured victims in Russia's overnight attack on Ukraine has risen to 20, including 18 injured victims stemming from an attack on a residential building in Dnipro, officials reported.

title: Dnipro: Attack attack on residential area
title_en: Dnipro: Attack attack on residential area
description: Update: Russian attack on central, southern Ukraine injures at least 12. The number of injured victims in an overnight Russian attack on Dnipro has risen to nine people, including a child, Dnipropetrovsk Oblast Governor Oleksandr Hanzha reported. Three others were also injured in Odesa in an attack on a residential building overnight.
description_en: Update: Russian attack on central, southern Ukraine injures at least 12. The number of injured victims in an overnight Russian attack on Dnipro has risen to nine people, including a child, Dnipropetrovsk Oblast Governor Oleksandr Hanzha reported. Three others were also injured in Odesa in an attack on a residential building overnight.
description_uk: Update: Russian attack on central, southern Ukraine injures at least 12. The number of injured victims in an overnight Russian attack on Dnipro has risen to nine people, including a child, Dnipropetrovsk Oblast Governor Oleksandr Hanzha reported. Three others were also injured in Odesa in an attack on a residential building overnight.

description_uk: Нова група БпЛА з Чорно моря ➡️ на Одещину. 🛵 Група БпЛА з Херсонщини ➡️ курсом на Кривий Ріг. 🛵 БпЛА на Дніпропетровщині ➡️ курсом на Павлоград, Чаплине. 🛵 БпЛА на сході Харківщини ➡️ курсом на Чугуїв. 🛵 БпЛА на півночі Сумщини ➡️ курсом на Кролевець. 🛵 Кілька груп БпЛА на півночі Чернігівщини ➡️ курсом на Чернігів, Городню, Славутич. 🛵 БпЛА на Житомирщині ➡️ курсом на Звягель.

title: Kyiv: Drone attack
description: Cuba seeking Russian drones, military equipment amid discussions of attack on Guantanamo Bay, Axios reports. Cuba has sought to acquire drones and other military equipment from Russia within the past month and is discussing plans to attack the U.S. military base at Guantanamo Bay, targets in Key West, and U.S. military vessels, Axios reported May 17, citing unnamed U.S. officials.
description_en: Cuba seeking Russian drones, military equipment amid discussions of attack on Guantanamo Bay, Axios reports. Cuba has sought to acquire drones and other military equipment from Russia within the past month and is discussing plans to attack the U.S. military base at Guantanamo Bay, targets in Key West, and U.S. military vessels, Axios reported May 17, citing unnamed U.S. officials.

description_uk: Сьогодні дуже масштабно Сили оборони України, наша Служба безпеки України, наша розвідка відпрацювали по Московському регіону. Хороша хвиля наших дипстрайків – забезпечуємо Україні цю можливість. Дистанція до цілей цього разу – більш ніж 500 кілометрів, це вагомо ще й тому, що Московський регіон найбільш насичений російськими засобами ППО. Вони свій район влади бережуть найбільше. title: On the Day of Remembrance of the Victims of Political Repression, we...
title_en: On the Day of Remembrance of the Victims of Political Repression, we...
title_uk: У День пам'яті жертв політичних репресій ми...
description: On the Day of Remembrance of the Victims of Political Repression, we honor the millions of people destroyed by the Soviet totalitarian regime. Mass arrests, torture, extrajudicial executions, deportations and politically motivated persecution have become tragedies for generations of Ukrainians. Bykivnia, Demyaniv Laz, Pyatikhatky, Rutchenkove Pole and dozens of other places throughout Ukraine and outside our country are evidence of tragedies,...
description_en: On the Day of Remembrance of the Victims of Political Repression, we honor the millions of people destroyed by the Soviet totalitarian regime. Mass arrests, torture, extrajudicial executions, deportations and politically motivated persecution have become tragedies for generations of Ukrainians. Bykivnia, Demyaniv Laz, Pyatikhatky, Rutchenkove Pole and dozens of other places throughout Ukraine and outside our country are evidence of tragedies,...
description_uk: У День пам’яті жертв політичних репресій ми вшановуємо мільйони людей, знищених радянським тоталітарним режимом. Масові арешти, катування, розстріли без суду, депортації та переслідування за політичними мотивами стали трагедіями для поколінь українців. Биківня, Дем’янів Лаз, П’ятихатки, Рутченкове поле та десятки інших місць по всій Україні та за межами нашої держави є свідченнями трагедій,...
